name: Rage
scalingSummary: 2 uses at L1, 3 at L3, 4 at L6, 5 at L12, 6 at L17; damage bonus: +2 at L1, +3 at L9, +4 at L16
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, enter a rage for up to 1 minute. Advantage on Strength checks and saves, bonus melee weapon damage (+2 to +4), resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing damage. Cannot cast spells or concentrate while raging. Ends early if no attack made or damage taken in a round.

evidence.pointer: Barbarian L1: Rage; featureDescriptions; resource tracking not implemented

notes: Persistent Rage at L15 prevents rage from ending early due to not attacking/taking damage.

name: Unarmored Defense (Barbarian)
mechanicalSummary: While not wearing armor, AC = 10 + Dexterity modifier + Constitution modifier. Can use a shield and still benefit.

evidence.pointer: Barbarian L1: Unarmored Defense; calculated in equipment.ts

name: Reckless Attack
mechanicalSummary: When making your first attack on your turn, choose to attack with advantage on all melee weapon Strength attacks this turn. Attack rolls against you have advantage until your next turn.
notes: Not an action — modifies how attacks are made.

name: Danger Sense
mechanicalSummary: Advantage on Dexterity saving throws against effects you can see (traps, spells). Must not be blinded, deafened, or incapacitated.

name: Extra Attack
mechanicalSummary: Attack twice when taking the Attack action.

name: Fast Movement
mechanicalSummary: +10 ft speed while not wearing heavy armor.

name: Feral Instinct
mechanicalSummary: Advantage on initiative rolls. Can act normally on first turn of combat even if surprised, provided you enter rage first.

name: Brutal Critical
scalingSummary: 1 extra weapon die on crit at L9, 2 at L13, 3 at L17
mechanicalSummary: Roll one additional weapon damage die when determining the extra damage for a critical hit. Increases at higher levels.

name: Relentless Rage
trigger: When dropped to 0 HP while raging and not killed outright
scalingSummary: Con save DC 10, increases by 5 each success until short/long rest resets it
mechanicalSummary: When dropping to 0 HP while raging, make DC 10 Constitution save to drop to 1 HP instead. DC increases by 5 each time you succeed until a rest resets it.
notes: Escalating DC makes successive saves harder.

name: Persistent Rage
mechanicalSummary: Rage ends early only if you fall unconscious or choose to end it. Normal early-end conditions (no attack/damage) no longer apply.

name: Indomitable Might
mechanicalSummary: If total Strength check is less than Strength score, can use Strength score instead.

name: Primal Champion
mechanicalSummary: Strength and Constitution scores increase by 4, to a maximum of 24.

name: Frenzy (Berserker)
resourceCostSummary: No additional resource, but grants bonus-action attacks while raging
mechanicalSummary: While raging, can make a single melee weapon attack as a bonus action on each turn. Suffer one level of exhaustion when rage ends.
notes: Exhaustion cost is significant — 5e exhaustion imposes disadvantage on ability checks at level 1, speed halved at 2, etc.

name: Mindless Rage (Berserker)
mechanicalSummary: Cannot be charmed or frightened while raging. Any such effects are suspended for the duration of rage.

name: Intimidating Presence (Berserker)
mechanicalSummary: As an action, choose a creature within 30 ft. Wis save vs (8+PB+Cha) or be frightened until end of your next turn. Can repeat action on subsequent turns to extend.

name: Retaliation (Berserker)
trigger: When taking damage from a creature within 5 ft
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to make a melee weapon attack against the creature that damaged you.

name: Totem Spirit: Bear (Totem Warrior)
mechanicalSummary: While raging, resistance to all damage except psychic.
notes: Classified as passive because it's a permanent modification of rage, not an action. This is a choice among options.

name: Totem Spirit: Eagle (Totem Warrior)
mechanicalSummary: While raging, opportunity attacks against you have disadvantage. Can Dash as a bonus action.
notes: Bonus-action Dash granted while raging only.

name: Ancestral Protectors (Ancestral Guardian)
trigger: First creature hit on your turn while raging
mechanicalSummary: While raging, first creature you hit on your turn has disadvantage on attacks against anyone but you, and allies hit by that creature have resistance to its damage until start of your next turn.

name: Spirit Shield (Ancestral Guardian)
trigger: When a creature within 30 ft takes damage while you are raging
scalingSummary: Damage reduction: 2d6 at L6, 3d6 at L10, 4d6 at L14
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to reduce the damage by rolling 2d6 (scaling to 4d6).

name: Vengeful Ancestors (Ancestral Guardian)
trigger: When using Spirit Shield to reduce damage
mechanicalSummary: When Spirit Shield reduces damage, the attacker takes force damage equal to the amount prevented.

name: Storm Aura (Storm Herald)
resourceCostSummary: Activates when entering rage; can reactivate as bonus action
mechanicalSummary: When entering rage, aura activates with chosen environment (Desert: fire damage to all in aura; Sea: Dex save or lightning damage to one; Tundra: temp HP to allies in aura). Reactivate as bonus action each turn.

name: Divine Fury (Zealot)
trigger: First creature hit on your turn while raging
mechanicalSummary: While raging, the first creature you hit each turn takes extra 1d6 + half barbarian level necrotic or radiant damage.

name: Fanatical Focus (Zealot)
trigger: When failing a saving throw while raging
mechanicalSummary: Reroll a failed saving throw while raging. Must use new roll. Once per rage.

name: Zealous Presence (Zealot)
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, unleash a battle cry. Up to 10 allies within 60 ft gain advantage on attack rolls and saving throws until your next turn.

name: Rage beyond Death (Zealot)
mechanicalSummary: While raging, 0 HP doesn't knock you unconscious. Still make death saves; 3 failures still kill you. You die if your rage ends and you still have 0 HP.
notes: Significant survival passive — the Zealot can fight through lethal damage while raging.

name: Form of the Beast (Beast)
mechanicalSummary: When raging, manifest a natural weapon: Bite (1d8 piercing + Con mod heal if below half HP, once per turn), Claws (1d6 slashing + one extra claw attack as part of Attack action), Tail (1d8 piercing, reach, reaction +1d8 AC vs melee hit).

evidence.pointer: beast L3: Form of the Beast

notes: Claws option grants an additional attack per Attack action.

name: Infectious Fury (Beast)
trigger: When hitting with natural weapons while raging
mechanicalSummary: Target must make Wis save or either use its reaction to attack another creature of your choice, or take 2d12 psychic damage.

name: Magic Awareness (Wild Soul / Wild Magic)
mechanicalSummary: As an action, sense the location of spells and magic items within 60 ft not behind total cover, and learn the school of any spell sensed.
notes: Wild Soul subclass has features in the repo data despite being flagged as EMPTY in the audit. Features are present in subclasses.json.

name: Wild Surge (Wild Soul / Wild Magic)
mechanicalSummary: When entering rage, roll on Wild Magic table for a random effect. Options include: damage aura, teleportation, summon flumph, AC bonus, etc. If effect requires a save, DC = 8+PB+Con.
notes: Random table effects would each need their own capability rows for a full audit.

name: Bolstering Magic (Wild Soul / Wild Magic)
mechanicalSummary: As an action, touch a creature to grant either a d3 bonus to attack rolls and ability checks for 10 minutes, or recover one spell slot of up to 3rd level.

name: Unstable Backlash (Wild Soul / Wild Magic)
trigger: When taking damage or failing a saving throw while raging
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to roll on the Wild Magic table and replace your current Wild Magic effect with the new one.

name: Battlerager Armor (Battlerager)
mechanicalSummary: While raging and wearing spiked armor, use bonus action to make a melee attack with armor spikes (1d4 piercing + Str + rage bonus).

name: Battlerager Charge (Battlerager)
mechanicalSummary: While raging, can Dash as a bonus action.

name: Spiked Retribution (Battlerager)
trigger: When a creature within 5 ft hits you with a melee attack while you are raging and wearing spiked armor
mechanicalSummary: Attacker takes 3 piercing damage.
